meta-description: Learn about eligible immigration statuses by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Eligible immigration status
excerpt: An immigration status that's considered eligible for getting health coverage through the Marketplace. The rules for eligible immigration status may be different in each insurance affordability program.
content:
An immigration status that's considered eligible for getting health coverage through the Marketplace. The rules for eligible immigration status may be different in each insurance affordability program.
